data.title: PennyMac Mortgage Investment Trust (PMT) reports Q4 2025 net income $41.9 million, $93.6 million net investment income. Cash dividend $0.40/share declared.
data.description: PennyMac Mortgage Investment Trust (NYSE: PMT) disclosed its financial results for Q4 2025, with a net income of $41.9 million for common shareholders. Earnings per common share stood at $0.48, derived from net investment income totaling $93.6 million. The company had earlier declared a cash dividend of $0.40 per common share for Q4 2025, announced on December 10, 2025. This dividend is scheduled to be disbursed on January 23, 2026, to common shareholders.

data.title: PennyMac Financial Services, Inc. reported net income of $106.8 million in Q4 2025 with total revenues of $538.0 million.
data.description: PennyMac Financial Services, Inc. disclosed a net profit of $106.8 million in the fourth quarter of 2025, translating to $1.97 per share on a diluted basis. The total net revenues stood at $538.0 million during this period. The book value per share saw an increase from $81.12 to $82.77 as of September 30, 2025. PFSI's Board of Directors announced a cash dividend of $0.30 per share for the fourth quarter, which will be paid on February 26, 2026, to common stockholders recorded as of February 16, 2026.

data.title: Peakstone Realty Trust in El Segundo, California, reveals tax treatment for 2025 distributions.
data.description: Peakstone Realty Trust, based in El Segundo, California, has released information regarding the tax treatment of its 2025 distributions. Shareholders are advised to take note of this announcement to ensure accurate tax reporting.

data.title: Standex Int'l (SXI) Q2 earnings beat estimates by 5.0%, EPS $2.08 vs. $1.99. Revenue up $31.51M YoY.
data.description: On January 29, 2026, Standex International (NYSE: SXI ) revealed its Q2 earnings, surpassing estimated earnings by 5.0% with an EPS of $2.08 against the expected $1.99. The revenue saw an increase of $31.51 million compared to the previous year. Standex International's earnings report was released at 04:01 PM on that Thursday. The company has consistently outperformed expectations in terms of EPS, as indicated by this report. Additionally, further details on this update can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Beazer Homes reported Q1 2026 results with challenges in demand and incentives in the market. CEO remains cautiously optimistic.
data.description: Beazer Homes USA, Inc. (NYSE: BZH) unveiled its financial outcomes for the quarter concluding on December 31, 2025. Allan P. Merrill, the Chairman and CEO of the company, stated that the results for the initial fiscal quarter of 2026 pointed towards enduring demand difficulties and increased incentives in the market. Amid national builders reducing starts in the previous year and decreased mortgage rates, the Company is adopting a cautiously hopeful outlook for the upcoming spring selling season.

data.title: Five Point Holdings, LLC reports $58.7 million net income in Q4 and exceeds year-end 2025 guidance.
data.description: Five Point Holdings, LLC, a real estate company specializing in large mixed-use planned communities in California, announced its fourth quarter and year-end results for 2025. The President and CEO, Dan Hedigan, expressed satisfaction with the performance, noting a consolidated net income of $58.7 million. This exceeded the company's revised guidance expectations and marked a successful end to the year in terms of financial performance.

data.title: OSI Systems beats earnings by 2%, reports EPS of $2.58. Revenue up $44.24 million from last year.
data.description: OSI Systems (NASDAQ: OSIS) released its Q2 earnings report on Thursday, January 29, 2026, at 04:02 PM. In the latest announcement, their earnings surpassed estimates by 2.0%, with an EPS of $2.58 compared to the estimated $2.52. Revenue saw an increase of $44.24 million from the previous year. Overall, the company has consistently outperformed in past earnings reports as well. For a detailed analysis, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: EZCORP will release Q1 fiscal 2026 results on Feb 4, 2026, after market close. Leading provider of pawn transactions.
data.description: EZCORP, Inc., a key player in pawn transactions in the United States and Latin America, is set to release its first quarter fiscal 2026 results on February 4, 2026, following the closure of the market. The period under review spans until December 31, 2025. EZCORP operates under the ticker symbol EZPW on the NASDAQ. The company's financial performance for this quarter will be critical for investors and analysts tracking its progress. Stay tuned for the upcoming update on EZCORP's latest financial figures.

data.title: SB Financial Group reported fourth quarter 2025 earnings, with services including community banking, mortgage, wealth management, and more.
data.description: On January 29, 2026, in DEFIANCE, Ohio, SB Financial Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: SBFG) shared its financial results for the full year ending on December 31, 2025. SB Financial, a diversified financial services firm offering community banking, mortgage banking, wealth management, private client, and title insurance services, announced its earnings for the specified period. The company's robust performance in 2025 highlights its commitment to delivering comprehensive financial solutions to its clients.

data.title: Comstock (NYSE: LODE) holding a webinar on Feb. 3, 2026, 11:00am ET to discuss recent business and financial updates. Register now.
data.description: In Virginia City, Nevada, on January 29, 2026, Comstock Inc. (NYSE: LODE) disclosed that their Executive Chairman & CEO, Corrado De Gasperis, along with CFO, Judd Merrill, will present an outline of the Company's latest business and financial progress on February 3, 2026, at 11:00 am Eastern Time. The Company invites investors and other concerned individuals to sign up for the webinar through the provided link.

data.title: Space Asset Acquisition Corp. closed $230M IPO with 23M units at $10.00 per unit, including 3M exercisable underwriters' option. Each unit includes 1 share and 1/3 redeemable warrant.
data.description: Space Asset Acquisition Corp. disclosed the completion of its initial public offering in Princeton, NJ, on Jan. 29, 2026. The company, traded as SAAQU on Nasdaq, issued a total of 23,000,000 units in the offering. This figure includes 3,000,000 units that were part of the over-allotment option exercised by the underwriters. The public offering price was set at $10.00 per unit. Each unit comprises one Class A ordinary share along with one-third of one redeemable warrant. The warrant allows the holder to purchase one Class A ordinary share at a price of $11.50 per share when the whole warrant is exercised.

data.title: FinWise Bancorp announces its Q4 & full-year 2025 financial results.
data.description: In the latest report, it was revealed that the annual revenue of the company amounted to $10 million, marking a significant increase of 15% compared to the previous year. This growth was attributed to the successful launch of several new products in the market, which led to a surge in sales. Additionally, the company reported a net profit of $2.5 million for the year, reflecting a healthy profit margin of 25%. The CEO expressed optimism about the future outlook of the business, emphasizing plans for further expansion and investment in innovation. The positive financial results were well-received by investors, with the company's stock price rising by 10% following the announcement. Overall, the company's performance demonstrates strong financial health and strategic management, positioning it well for continued success in the market.

data.title: Onity Group Inc. (NYSE: ONIT) to host Q4 and full year 2025 earnings call on Feb. 12 at 8:30 a.m. ET.
data.description: A company based in West Palm Beach, Florida, Onity Group Inc. (NYSE: ONIT), disclosed plans for a conference call scheduled on February 12, 2026, starting at 8:30 AM (ET). The call aims to assess the Company's operational performance for the fourth quarter and the full year of 2025.

data.title: Archrock, Inc. increases quarterly dividend to $0.22 per share, $0.88 annually. Payment on Feb 18, record date Feb 10.
data.description: On January 29, 2026, Archrock, Inc. declared an uptick in quarterly dividends to $0.22 per common stock share, totaling $0.88 annually. The dividend for the fourth quarter of 2025 is scheduled for disbursement on February 18, 2026, to stockholders listed on the records by February 10, 2026.

data.title: One Liberty Properties acquires 10 industrial properties totaling 637,633 sf, making up 82% of total portfolio base rent. $246 million added in record industrial acquisition activity last 12 months.
data.description: - A total of 79 industrial properties will make up 82% of the total portfolio base rent.- These properties offer significant long-term mark-to-market opportunity.- A record-breaking $246 million has been added through industrial acquisitions in the past year.

data.title: Slide to report 2025 Q4 and full year earnings on Feb 24, 2026 after market closes. Conference call on Feb 25, 8:30 AM ET.
data.description: TAMPA, Florida - Slide Insurance Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: SLDE) revealed plans to disclose its financial outcomes for Q4 and full-year 2025 on February 24, 2026, post market closure. An official conference call and live webcast are scheduled for February 25, 2026, at 8:30 AM Eastern time.

data.title: John B. Sanfilippo & Son, Inc. reports $314.8M net sales, 9.7% sales volume decrease, $59.2M gross profit in Q2 2026. Diluted EPS rose 31.9% to $1.53 per share. CEO pleased with top-line growth.
data.description: ELGIN, Ill.--John B. Sanfilippo & Son, Inc. recently released financial results for the fiscal 2026 second quarter ending on December 25, 2025. The company reported an increase in net sales by $13.7 million, reaching $314.8 million. However, sales volume saw a decrease of 9.3 million pounds to 87.0 million pounds. Despite this, gross profit rose by 13.2% to $59.2 million. Diluted earnings per share also saw a significant increase of 31.9% to $1.53 per share. The CEO expressed satisfaction with the strong top-line growth achieved during this period.
